Interface Expression

All Superinterfaces:
EqualsModProperty<SourceElement>, ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SyntaxElement
All Known Subinterfaces:
ExpressionStatement, ProgramConstruct
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractIntegerLiteral, AllFields, AllObjects, ArrayInitializer, ArrayLength, ArrayLengthReference, ArrayPostDecl, ArrayReference, Assignment, BinaryAnd, BinaryAndAssignment, BinaryNot, BinaryOperator, BinaryOr, BinaryOrAssignment, BinaryXOr, BinaryXOrAssignment, BooleanLiteral, CharLiteral, ComparativeOperator, Conditional, ConstructorCall, CopyAssignment, CreateObject, Divide, DivideAssignment, DLEmbeddedExpression, DoBreak, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, EnhancedForElimination, Equals, EvaluateArgs, ExactInstanceof, ExpandMethodBody, FieldReference, FloatLiteral, ForInitUnfoldTransformer, ForToWhile, FreeLiteral, GreaterOrEquals, GreaterThan, InitArray, InitArrayCreation, Instanceof, Intersect, IntLiteral, IsStatic, LessOrEquals, LessThan, Literal, LocationVariable, LogicalAnd, LogicalNot, LogicalOr, LongLiteral, MetaClassReference, MethodCall, MethodReference, Minus, MinusAssignment, Modulo, ModuloAssignment, MultipleVarDecl, Negative, New, NewArray, NotEquals, NullLiteral, Operator, ParenthesizedExpression, PassiveExpression, Plus, PlusAssignment, Positive, PostDecrement, PostIncrement, PostWork, PreDecrement, PreIncrement, ProgramConstant, ProgramSV, ProgramTransformer, ProgramVariable, RealLiteral, ReattachLoopInvariant, SchematicFieldReference, SeqConcat, SeqGet, SeqIndexOf, SeqLength, SeqPut, SeqReverse, SeqSingleton, SeqSub, SetMinus, SetUnion, ShiftLeft, ShiftLeftAssignment, ShiftRight, ShiftRightAssignment, Singleton, SpecialConstructorCall, StaticInitialisation, StringLiteral, Subtype, SuperReference, SwitchToIf, ThisReference, Times, TimesAssignment, TypeCast, TypeOf, TypeOperator, Unpack, UnsignedShiftRight, UnsignedShiftRightAssignment, UnwindLoop, VariableReference
public interface Expression extends ProgramElement
Expression taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
